title: ADR-0024: Agent Staging Area supersedes the OPS Librarian feature specs — Card Contract v1 → Proposal (verbatim superset)
verdict_summary: Canonical ADR (ratified 2026-07-10) — a decision record, not a build spec. It records the supersession of the OPS "Feature PRD: The Librarian" and the product-feature role of orvex-studio-api FR-SA12–16 into the staging platform canon (PRD MyS79tK0k7 + spine DBA3v1gglh). It introduces NO new requirement ids of its own; every build obligation it enacts is expressed through requirement ids owned by the staging PRD/spine (FR-STG1 capture on-ramp, FR-STG25 hard-cut of all agent wiki-write surfaces, FR-SA12–16 Card Contract authority, AD-12 verbatim-supersession/cut-loud, PRD OQ5 Card→Proposal field-mapping table). All eight referenced ids are in covers-union.json, and the concrete migration obligations each have a dedicated story: "Curator supersession — Card v1→Proposal verbatim mapping + goldens", "Curator→staging supersession (classifyOnSave → staging submit)", "Hard-cut migration of ALL agent wiki-write surfaces", "MCP staging section — staging_* tools". The doc-level supersession/amend actions (flip yHnxCDuZ6O, section-amend 85qj2wwU2L, carry-forward MEcmPZvEdV) are definition-phase living-wiki obligations covered by the pack spine. Zero uncovered BUILD gaps.

components.name: orvex-studio-staging (Go satellite: Proposals, ChangeSets, Librarian, Autonomy Dial, apply engine)
components.quote: a new Go satellite orvex-studio-staging owning Proposals, ChangeSets, the Librarian (triage/routing/beautify/policy/learning/sweep), the Autonomy Dial, and the apply engine

components.name: Card→Proposal field-mapping table (golden-verified against shipped Curator goldens)
components.quote: The Card→Proposal field-mapping table is produced and golden-verified in the migration epic (PRD OQ5); the shipped Curator goldens are the acceptance gate

components.name: classifyOnSave capture on-ramp (forwards to staging submit; local classification path removed at cutover)
components.quote: classifyOnSave becomes a capture on-ramp forwarding to staging submit (FR-STG1); its local classification path is removed at cutover with a loud migration error

components.name: SM-1 leak alarm (standing verification of zero direct agent wiki writes post-cut)
components.quote: SM-1's leak alarm (any non-zero direct agent wiki write post-cut) becomes the standing verification that this supersession has no holes
